gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Brahmin' OR T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '21' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC

పేదరిక రేఖకు పైన నివసించే గ్రామీణ కుటుంబాలు ఉన్న, కానీ పేదరిక రేఖకు పైన నివసించే ఏ ఊరు కుటుంబాలు లేని జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.DISTRICT
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION hc ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = hc.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS pm ON hc.HOUSEHOLD_ID = pm.HOUSEHOLD_ID
WHERE g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural'
  AND pm.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No'
  AND g.DISTRICT NOT IN (
    SELECT g2.DISTRICT
    FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g2
    JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION hc2 ON g2.GEOGRAPHY_ID = hc2.GEOGRAPHY_ID
    JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS pm2 ON hc2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = pm2.HOUSEHOLD_ID
    WHERE g2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban'
      AND pm2.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No'
);
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT g.DISTRICT
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION hc ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = hc.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS pm ON hc.HOUSEHOLD_ID = pm.HOUSEHOLD_ID
WHERE g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural'
  AND pm.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No'
  AND g.DISTRICT NOT IN (
    SELECT g2.DISTRICT
    FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g2
    JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION hc2 ON g2.GEOGRAPHY_ID = hc2.GEOGRAPHY_ID
    JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS pm2 ON hc2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = pm2.HOUSEHOLD_ID
    WHERE g2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban'
      AND pm2.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No'
);

gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) < 996 ORDER BY SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.STATE,
    g.DISTRICT,
    SUM(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) AS total_children_0_to_14,
    AVG(fpm.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) AS avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC) AS rank
FROM
    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS fpm
    JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION fhc ON fpm.HOUSEHOLD_ID = fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID

WHERE
    g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural'
GROUP BY
    g.STATE,
    g.DISTRICT
HAVING
    AVG(fpm.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) < 996
ORDER BY
    rank;

question:

question: ఉద్యోగం కలిగి ఉన్న వ్యక్తుల కోసం, లింగం ఆధారంగా విభజించబడిన, పూర్తి చేసిన విద్య యొక్క సగటు సంవత్సరాలు మరియు మొత్తం వ్యక్తుల సంఖ్య ఎంత?

question:

gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_SOURCES AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 10

    hhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID,
